title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Hyogoro, Beast Pirates as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's still colour of arrangement haki, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this MAK! you speak of must be what outsiders call it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat-man....!! here in Wano, we also have an ABILITY like that. It is transferred to a sword from the user's body...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that when we want to cut something, our sword will cut even the thickest of steel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And when we do not want to cut something, our sword will not cut the thinnest of paper! The sword becomes one with the swordmaster!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A long time ago... I learned that tech- nique from a sword- Master.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not know if I will be able to teach it to you, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's gonna swing the sword in his right hand with every- thing he's got!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhaha!! Looks like you've still got some life left in you, gramps!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: He defeated one of the gifters!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so grandpa Hyogorou really is Hyogorougoro of the flower...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What you were trying to do...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If so, I may be able to help you....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 28 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
